text.message: do you even know who has any?
wasnt paying attention tbh at work LOL

im just here for vibes and good RNG
is that all you base your decision making on?
not who has the best setup
you have the best set up out of us 3 LOL
who do you think has better?
im playing wheatless and low sheep
you have the easiest and best port
WhT blue  didnt build 3ven a road
does anyone have sheep and ore?
I can port and do a 2:1
dude... who is trading wheat on this board?
blue, what do you need for settle?
black, can you give blue a wheat please?
black, help balance the board and trade a wheat to blue
why not settle on the sheep port?
probably just wanted to secure it first
Im not producing  alot of sheep
blue would you trade a wheat?
just asking you can say no
i said youre right man i didnt fish
U are probably  2 road away from win
black, i hope you don't play at work anymore
and recognize how your steals just were bad early game
If u want me to take road need
gotta do it the hard way

my rolls suk but i guess i should have been patient
